macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stocks Edge Higher Amid Iran Tensions and Surging Oil Prices
items.summary: Dow Jones rose 0.01% to 49,613.98, S&P 500 gained 0.24%, and Nasdaq up 0.09% in Monday morning trading, while oil surged past $100 per barrel after President Trump's rejection of Iran's proposal; VIX climbed 5.12% ahead of key CPI and PPI data.

items.title: Billionaire Ken Griffin Warns Prolonged Strait of Hormuz Closure Could Trigger Global Recession
items.summary: Citadel founder Ken Griffin predicts a global recession if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed for 6-12 months, driving energy prices materially higher; US recession odds near 49% per Moody's, with inflation above Fed target limiting rate cuts.

items.title: BlackRock: US Equities Hit Records Despite Oil Spike, But Strait Reopening Key to Resilience
items.summary: S&P 500 up 10% in April on strong earnings and AI growth, with mega-cap tech leading; BlackRock overweight US and EM stocks but warns US economy vulnerable if Middle East oil disruptions persist and Strait of Hormuz stays closed.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Futures See $218 Million in Liquidations Over 24 Hours
items.summary: The cryptocurrency derivatives market experienced $218 million in liquidations in the past 24 hours, led by Bitcoin at $91.5 million and Ethereum at $44 million, with Solana and XRP also seeing notable losses amid heightened volatility.

items.title: Over $163M in Crypto Long Positions Liquidated in 24 Hours
items.summary: More than $163 million in long crypto positions were liquidated across major exchanges as prices fell, with Bitcoin and Ethereum futures accounting for the majority of the forced closures.

items.title: Circle Raises $222M for Arc Token Presale at $3B Valuation
items.summary: Circle Internet Group raised $222 million in a presale for its Arc institutional Layer 1 blockchain from investors including BlackRock, a16z, and Apollo; the stock rose 2% following the announcement and strong Q1 earnings.

items.title: Bitcoin Whale Moves $41M in BTC After 12 Years Dormant
items.summary: A dormant Bitcoin wallet transferred 500 BTC worth $41 million on May 10, amid similar whale activities preceding exchange deposits, with BTC trading near $80,900.

items.title: XRP Breaks $1.45 Resistance on Heavy Volume
items.summary: XRP surged from $1.42 to a high of $1.51 over 24 hours on heavy volume, marking a 6.5% range with a decisive breakout during peak trading hours.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: TAO Rises 4% in 24 Hours: Bittensor AI Crypto Token Hits $320
items.summary: Bittensor's TAO token surged 4.1% to $320.54 with $306.4M trading volume, boosting its $3.07B market cap amid AI crypto trends.

items.title: The AI Paradox: More Humanlike Means Less Autonomous
items.summary: AI executives from Google DeepMind and Anthropic predict AGI by 2030 or sooner at Davos, but increasing humanlikeness may reduce true autonomy in machines.

items.title: Microsoft CEO Nadella to Testify in Musk vs. Altman AI Trial Week 3
items.summary: Satya Nadella testifies Monday in Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman over non-profit promises, with Musk warning of AGI arriving next year.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Nintendo Reveals Star Fox 64 Remake for Switch 2
items.summary: Nintendo has announced a remake of Star Fox 64 coming to the Nintendo Switch 2 sooner than expected. The reveal was highlighted in the latest DF Direct Weekly episode.

items.title: Nintendo Increases Prices for Switch 2 Console
items.summary: Nintendo has raised the price of its upcoming Switch 2 console, sparking concern among fans and industry watchers. Details were discussed in DF Direct Weekly.

items.title: Next Call of Duty to Drop PS4 and Last-Gen Support
items.summary: Activision confirms the upcoming Call of Duty title will leave behind last-generation hardware like the PS4. This shift was covered in recent gaming news roundup.

items.title: Pragmata Receives Surprise PS5 Pro Resolution Boost
items.summary: Pragmata has gained an undocumented resolution increase on the PlayStation 5 Pro, continuing its saga of performance updates. Additional Switch 2 optimizations were also noted.

items.title: Mobile Legends Patch 2.1.80 Brings 21 Hero Changes and Street Fighter Collab
items.summary: The advanced server for Mobile Legends patch 2.1.80 introduces major buffs and nerfs to 21 heroes, including big QoL for Yin and nerfs to Ruby, plus new Street Fighter collaboration content.

items.title: Nvidia GTX 10-Series Marks 10th Anniversary
items.summary: The panel on DF Direct Weekly celebrated the 10th anniversary of Nvidia's Pascal architecture behind the GTX 10-series GPUs.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: KTEK Aerosystems Meets $10M IPO Target in Under 24 Hours with 3x Oversubscription
items.summary: KTEK Aerosystems Ltd (ASX: KTK) achieved its full $10 million IPO target in less than 24 hours, attracting over $30 million in bids from institutional investors including Regal Funds Management and Thorney Investment Group. The company is set to list on the ASX on May 18, 2026.
